name: Belgian Club Soda Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the biscuit mix and Club soda until well mixed.
2. Add the egg and oil, stirring gently to incorporate all ingredients.
3. Pour the batter into a Belgian waffle iron for an extra light waffle.
4. Cook according to the manufacturer's instructions.
5. Makes four Belgian waffles.
